name: Ewon Comfortech Co., Ltd.
summary: Ewon Comfortech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells commercial vehicle seats in Korea. It provides air suspension, spring suspension, air multi-function, and premium seats; and interior parts, such as shelves, sleeping beds, luggage racks, insulators, and sun visors. The company was formerly known as Ewon Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Ewon Comfortech Co., Ltd. in September 2000. Ewon Comfortech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Nonsan, South Korea.
